vehicle.model_designation_position: front grille, right side (from viewer perspective)

composition.truck_orientation: oriented toward the viewer at a shallow left angle
composition.important_crop_information: truck is fully within frame; no major crop of cab or trailer

roof_lights.position: on top of cab, one left and one right

bumper_lights.position: outer edges of lower bumper, left and right

main_headlights.position: left and right, integrated into lower edges of front fascia

front_geometry.grille_description: four large horizontal slats with mesh, chrome-edged, large Mercedes-Benz roundel at center
front_geometry.headlight_description: polygonal, modern LED-style units with distinct configuration, black surround, placed at outer lower corners of cab front
front_geometry.bumper_description: multi-part with vents, integrated fog lights, and lower matte black central section
